description: Classic Edgelord 1:1. Both trivia-passed. Both same set (Chilling Reign / SWSH6). Adjacent collector numbers 047 + 048 — designer-coordinated cohort placement. Direct evolution-line members (Mareep evolves into Flaaffy at level 15 per Bulbapedia / PokemonTCG.io evolvesTo field). The visual contrast across the two cards composes into a single seasonal-arc reading: Mareep in sunlit spring meadow vs Flaaffy in autumnal forest with falling leaves, the species' wool-loses-to-charge progression visibly staged from baseline-fluffy to bald-patches mid-evolution. Flaaffy's printed flavor text (*'It stores electricity in its fluffy fleece. If it stores up too much, it will start to go bald in those patches.'*) makes the cost-of-power motif designer-explicit. The third stage Ampharos (lighthouse-tail beacon) anchors the chain's endpoint but is not in corpus. Mirror is bidirectional — both cards updated. Professional sigh applied. Connection survives tag-collapse and synonym-merge passes because the evolution-line relationship is encoded in the API's evolvesTo / evolvesFrom fields and not just shared species tags.
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: swsh6-47 + swsh6-48 evolvesTo + evolvesFrom + flavorText fields]
[Bulbapedia: Mareep (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 179, Electric-type basic, evolves into Flaaffy at level 15]
[Bulbapedia: Flaaffy (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 180, Electric-type stage 1, cost-of-power bald-patches design]
other_candidates_considered: Pancham CSE-119 ↔ Pangoro CSE-120 evolution mirror — same-set adjacent-collector-numbers pattern, but Pancham not trivia'd yet (vision-only); wait for trivia pass before drawing

Single Strike mechanic cycle (Scroll of Scorn BST-133 + Urn of Vitality BST-139 + Scroll of Piercing CRE-154) Mr. Nodeley — threshold met (3 cards) but slot was already taken by Team Skull Nodeley in E2, defer to next pass
Furfrou forms-cycle Nodeley — premature, only 1 corpus card
Cosmog (Lunala/Solgaleo pre-evo) ↔ Lunatone celestial cluster — speculative, no canonical narrative tether between species, would be tag-bridge not edge
